title: ZXSpace Overview
description: Discover ZXSpace, the retro-inspired city-defence arcade shooter featuring alien waves, shields, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
summary: Protect your cities against relentless alien invasions in this modern take on the classic arcade space shooter.

images.caption: Protect your cities from wave after wave of alien invaders.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXSpace
paragraphs: ZXSpace is a retro-inspired city-defence arcade shooter and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.

Defend your cities from relentless alien attacks, protect your shields, collect powerful upgrades, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores as the invasion grows more dangerous with every wave.

sections.heading: Getting Started
paragraphs: Begin with the How to Play guide before exploring Controls, Game Modes, and Tips & Strategy.
Once you're familiar with the gameplay, continue with BarkinMad Coins, Achievements, and Leaderboards to discover everything ZXSpace has to offer.

sections.heading: Coming Soon
paragraphs: ZXSpace is currently in development and preparing for release on the App Store.
The Solo city-defence experience is the core focus, with additional features and gameplay updates planned as development continues.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Get Started
featureShowcases.summary: Discover what makes ZXSpace exciting and where to learn more about every part of the game.
body: ZXSpace combines classic arcade shooting with strategic city defence, rewarding careful positioning, quick reactions, and smart use of power-ups.
This guide introduces the game, explains the core mechanics, and helps you discover every feature as you prepare to defend your cities.
bullets: Master city defence and alien waves.
Explore achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Everything begins with defending your first city.

featureShowcases.heading: Keep Improving
featureShowcases.summary: Every wave helps you unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, survive more alien waves, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores through Apple Game Center.
Every completed game helps you become a stronger defender and prepares you for even greater challenges.

image.caption: Every wave is another opportunity to improve.
